name: pscale-biome
description: Experimental — biome unification of pscale node concerns into one self-unfolding package. NOT production.
_notes: Dep set is the union of bsp-mcp-server's substrate deps (sdk, hash-wasm, tweetnacl, zod) plus pscale-beach's storage dep (@upstash/redis) plus Claude API.
xstream's React/Vite/shadcn dependencies are NOT included yet. Add them when the visible interface gets wired — that is one of the unfolding decisions, not a default.
Build target deferred. tsc --noEmit just typechecks; no actual compile output is committed to.
